title: psychotria ruelliifolia
intro: Psychotria ruelliifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a type of wild coffee or mountain coffee. The leaves and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psychotria ruelliifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and can also be used in tincture or powder form, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
